summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Phase 2C: Entity Separation Dashboard. All 16 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend UI verified: Separation tab renders with overview stats, entity cards with alert badges (red/yellow/green), inter-entity flows table, and embedded alerts panel. Entity detail page shows entity-scoped alerts and recent transactions. Original Entities/Hierarchy tabs work correctly (regression passed).

issues: Console warning: HTML hydration error - <tr> cannot be child of <span> - appears to be from dev tooling wrapper (x-ve-dynamic), not affecting functionality
Console warning: Missing Description or aria-describedby for DialogContent (accessibility) - same as previous iterations

success_rate.frontend: 100% - All separation dashboard features working correctly

seed_data_creation: No new seed data created. Used existing test data from Phase 2A/2B testing.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 2C Entity Separation Dashboard fully tested. Backend endpoint GET /api/transactions/separation-dashboard returns entities with txn volumes, alert counts, inter-entity flows, and relationships. Frontend: /structures?tab=separation shows overview stats (entities, transactions, alerts, net flow), entity cards with red/yellow/green alert badges, inter-entity flows table, and embedded SeparationAlertsPanel. Entity cards are clickable and navigate to /entities/{entity_id}. EntityDetailPage now shows entity-scoped SeparationAlertsPanel and Recent Transactions table. Original Entities and Hierarchy tabs still work correctly.

GET /api/transactions/separation-dashboa.details: Returns entities with txn volumes, alert counts (red/yellow), inter-entity flows, relationships, alert_summary, transaction_summary

Frontend: Separation tab loads.details: /structures?tab=separation loads the Separation Dashboard tab correctly

Frontend: Overview stats.details: Shows 4 stats: Entities (4), Transactions 90d (4), Active Alerts (12 in red), Net Flow (-$20,500)

Frontend: Entity cards with alert badges.details: 4 entity cards rendered with red/yellow badges for Smith Family Trust, green checkmarks for others

Frontend: Inter-entity flows table.details: Shows Smith Family Trust → Smith Holdings LLC: $5,000 (1 transaction)

Frontend: Alerts panel embedded.details: SeparationAlertsPanel rendered at bottom of separation dashboard with Scan and History buttons

Frontend: Tab badge shows alert count.details: Separation tab shows red badge with '12' active alerts

Frontend: Entity detail page alerts.details: EntityDetailPage shows entity-scoped SeparationAlertsPanel with 6 red + 6 yellow alerts

Frontend: Entity detail page transaction.details: Recent Transactions table shows 4 transactions with Date, Amount, Classification, Memo columns

Frontend: Entities tab regression.details: 4 entity cards displayed with proper icons, names, types, EINs, jurisdictions

Frontend: Hierarchy tab regression.details: Hierarchy Tree and Relationships sections render correctly with ownership percentages
